WEEKLY REVIEW
Adaptive Trainer
Reviewing recent sessions…
Calendar Sync
Not connected.
Calendar correction
Calendar auto-checks when the app opens, comes online, or returns to the foreground, then rebuilds only if the calendar changed. Last week is review-only. Reminder-only events are ignored by default.

SETTINGS

One place for coach, nutrition, calendar, setup, sync, and budget.

Coach
Training Brain
Weekly goals, coach profile, autopilot, exercise caps, voice minimums, and trainer memory.
Nutrition
Daily Targets
Calories, macros, goal weight, and Apple Watch active-calorie earn-back rules.
Goal Weight (lbs)
Active Cal Rules
AW Baseline
Normal Ratio
Travel Ratio
Budget = base + (active - baseline) x ratio. Normal days use Normal Ratio. Travel/cheat days use Travel Ratio.
Calendar
Planner Rules
Calendar connection, auto-rebuild behavior, target days, locked-day rules, and learned corrections.
Calendar status loading...
Calendar Planner Rules
Setup
Connections
Apps Script backend, Cloudflare AI proxy/D1, Apple Health bridge, PWA checks, and provider tests.
Sync
Backup & Repair
Sheet authority, duplicate cleanup, local cache, sync queue, app doctor, and safe exports.
Budget
Money Model
Budget values are still edited on the Budget page because they are the page's core data, not background app settings.
Saves inline nutrition targets and planner rules, then returns to the last page.

Connections Setup
Connections Setup
Step 1 generate App token. Step 2 copy Apps Script properties. Step 3 redeploy backend. Step 4 test backend + token. Step 5 connect iCal. Step 6 test Health bridge + Shortcut JSON.
Backend: pending...
App token: not saved
Health token: not saved · iCal URL: not saved
AI Proxy Setup (Cloudflare fast path)
Cloudflare Pages uses same-origin /api by default. Only paste a separate Worker URL for temporary testing. AI uses Cloudflare first, trainer state caches to D1 when available, and Apps Script/Sheets remains the locked backup.
